description: Create a thematic atlas page of African countries showing GDP per capita, computed as GDP_MD * 1000000 / POP_EST in a new numeric field called DEV_IDX, displayed with a 5-class graduated color symbology. Overlay major African cities (POP_MAX > 1000000) from the populated places dataset (/home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp) as proportional circle symbols sized by POP_MAX (range 4 to 20). Produce a print-ready map layout containing the map view, a title 'Africa Development Index', a legend, and a scale bar. Export the layout to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/africa_dev_index.png. The exported image must be at least 1000 pixels wide.
